news.headline: OPEC+ agrees to make larger than expected supply hike in May.
ProVen VCT plc has issued a total of 3 million new shares.
25% tariff on US auto imports imposed by Trump increases costs. Source: Bloomberg.
Putin said to see Trump as able to deliver Ukraine concessions.
ETI acquires AeroMaritime Mediterranean from ITP Aero, a leader in aircraft engine MRO services.
news.summary: Montreal-based Essential Turbines Inc. (ETI) has disclosed on April 3, 2025 that it has finalized a deal with ITP Aero, a prominent aerospace propulsion firm. ETI, specializing in maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO) services for aircraft engines, has agreed to acquire...

news.headline: L.L.Bean partners with Boston Red Sox to release limited-edition Fenway Tarp Tote made from Red Sox infield rain tarp.
news.summary: Inspired by the iconic L.L.Bean Boat and Tote, the Fenway Tarp Tote is crafted from the Red Sox infield rain tarp. The collaboration between the beloved New England team and renowned outfitter has resulted in this unique product. The tote is a representation of the strong bond between the two entities and is set to be a sought-after item for fans. The tote is set to be launched on April 3, 2025, in Freeport, Maine. This partnership brings together the rich heritage of both the Red Sox and L.L.Bean, combining sports and fashion in a durable and stylish accessory. Fans and enthusiasts can now own a piece of history with this exclusive Fenway Tarp Tote.

news.headline: OPEC+ plans to increase 411k bpd in April - Statement.
OPEC+ countries agree to the increment originally planned for May in addition to two monthly increments.
The eight OPEC+ countries will meet on the 5th of May to decide on June production levels.
The Lead Nurturer launched in Durham, N.C. - a curated platform for digital strategy with newsletter, podcast, and community for marketing/sales pros.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, The Lead Nurturer was officially launched in Durham, North Carolina. This new platform, which includes a newsletter, podcast, and professional community, aims to be the premier thought leadership resource for marketing and sales professionals as they adapt to the changing landscape. The platform is supported by subscribers and hopes to become a valuable resource for professionals looking to stay informed and connected in the industry.

news.headline: Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, UAE, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria, and Oman reaffirm commitment to market stability on healthier oil market outlook and adjust production upward - Statement.
Builders FirstSource (NYSE: BLDR) to host Q1 2025 financial results discussion on May 1 at 8:00 am CT. CEO and CFO to be present.
news.summary: In Irving, Texas, Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) will conduct a conference call and webcast on May 1, 2025, led by Peter Jackson, President and CEO, and Pete Beckmann, CFO, to address financial results and business updates. The teleconference starts at 8:00 a.m. Central Time. For participation, dial the provided number a few minutes before the call.

news.headline: Gazillion Bubble Show debuts sensory-accessible performance in NYC on April 26 in partnership with KultureCity for World Autism Month.
news.summary: A unique event is being held in New York City on April 3, 2025, to celebrate World Autism Month in collaboration with KultureCity®. The celebrated Gazillion Bubble Show, a renowned family production Off-Broadway, is excited to reveal its inaugural special performance. This event marks a significant milestone for the show, which has been running successfully for a long period. The special performance aims to raise awareness and support for autism, an important cause.

news.headline: WTO Chief: Many countries have reached out about impact of US tariff announcements - Letter.
WTO Chief: Plans to respond to countries' questions, also suggests they talk to each other to address the issues - Letter
OPEC+ ministerial talks still continuing after almost two hours - Source.
Bigleaf Networks debuts "Go Beyond the Connection" podcast, showcasing internet connectivity's impact on business.
news.summary: Based in Portland, Oregon, Bigleaf Networks, a prominent provider of intelligent SD-WAN solutions, has launched the Go Beyond the Connection podcast. This original podcast series delves into the impact of internet connectivity on businesses, showcasing perspectives from industry experts, IT specialists, and forward-thinkers. Through real-life anecdotes, interviews with professionals, and actionable advice, Go Beyond the Connection aims to navigate the rapidly changing digital realm, offering valuable insights to consumers and enterprises.

news.headline: LegalShield appoints Jaymee Johnson as Chief Marketing Officer to drive growth initiatives and expand services to North Americans.
news.summary: LegalShield, based in Ada, Oklahoma, has appointed Jaymee Johnson as their new chief marketing officer to drive the company's expansion efforts and increase access to cost-effective legal and identity theft protection services for more individuals across North America. With a background in marketing leadership roles at Assurance IQ, T-Mobile, and Amazon, Johnson will be responsible for directing brand strategy, performance marketing, and member communications. By leveraging Johnson's proficiency in data-focused marketing and merchandising, LegalShield aims to enhance its outreach efforts to a wider audience.

news.headline: WisdomTree introduces 13 tokenized funds on its platform, the largest collection available, for direct access to real world assets.
news.summary: WisdomTree, Inc. (NYSE: WT) unveiled major updates to WisdomTree Connect, an institutional platform granting direct entry to tokenized real world assets (RWA). Users can now tap into a comprehensive set of 13 tokenized funds approved by the Securities and Exchange Commission under the Investment Company Act of 1940. This marks the most extensive assortment of tokenized funds available in the industry.

news.headline: EasyStreet's composite poles approved by ALDOT for highway right-of-ways, offering safer and cost-effective infrastructure deployment.
news.summary: Composite poles from EasyStreet have recently received approval from the Alabama Department of Transportation (ALDOT) in Montgomery. These poles offer a safer and more cost-effective option for creating clear zones, ultimately leading to smarter and more efficient infrastructure deployment. This approval signifies a significant advancement in road safety and infrastructure development in Alabama.

news.headline: Accelsius rolls out NeuCool System at Computacenter UK Hub, advancing its European reach. Key milestone in showcasing cooling solutions for partners and customers.
news.summary: Accelsius, a renowned provider of two-phase direct-to-chip liquid cooling technology, has unveiled that its NeuCool™ Thermal Simulation Rack is showcased at Computacenter’s HyperScale Integration Center in Hatfield, UK. This move is aimed at enhancing accessibility for European partners and customers to experience Accelsius’ innovative rack-level cooling solutions. The strategic placement of the rack at Computacenter’s headquarters signifies a significant milestone towards facilitating the viewing, testing, and deployment of Accelsius’ advanced cooling solutions in the region, demonstrating a strong partnership between the two entities.

news.headline: Onx Homes expands with 8 new communities in Florida & Texas, aiming to revolutionize housing markets.
news.summary: Miami-based company Onx Homes, known for its advanced resilient construction methods, has revealed plans for a major expansion. The homebuilder is set to introduce eight new communities in South Florida, Central Florida, and Texas, marking a crucial advancement in their goal to transform residential development. This move comes as a response to the rapid development and environmental challenges in these high-growth housing markets.

news.headline: BKV names Dilanka Seimon as its first Chief Commercial Officer, in charge of enhancing commercial operations.
news.summary: BKV Corporation, a publicly traded company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BKV, has recently named Dilanka Seimon as their new Chief Commercial Officer. Seimon will take on this newly established role with immediate effect. As the Chief Commercial Officer, Seimon's primary focus will be on enhancing the Company's commercial operations in the midstream sector, gas marketing, and promoting new products. This strategic move aims to capitalize on BKV's expertise in carbon capture, utilization, and sequestration (CCUS) as well as the growing demand for power. Seimon brings to the table a wealth of experience as a global energy executive, boasting over two decades of industry knowledge.

news.headline: CEO of SynergenX Health raises awareness on how Low T impacts men's energy, motivation, and mood as seasons change.
news.summary: Houston-based company SynergenX Health's CEO, Wayne Wilson, has highlighted that low testosterone (Low T) levels can cause fatigue, low motivation, and mood changes in some men even amidst the rejuvenating spring season. Wilson is raising awareness about this issue as spring is typically synonymous with increased energy and drive. Men experiencing lingering sluggishness or feeling unlike themselves during this time may be affected by Low T. Wilson emphasizes that it is crucial to address this potential hormonal imbalance for individuals to truly benefit from the fresh start that spring offers.

news.headline: ZINFI to host PartnerOps Symposium in Austin to explore AI-driven frameworks for partner operations.
news.summary: Key players in the global partner ecosystem will be focusing on the use of AI-powered strategies for recruitment, training, collaborative selling, and rewards within ZINFI's PartnerOps Symposium Series. The event will take place in Pleasanton, California on April 3, 2025. ZINFI Technologies, Inc., a prominent figure in Unified Partner Management, will host the symposium to address these critical areas. This symposium aims to foster innovation and collaboration among partners globally in terms of recruitment, enablement, co-selling, and incentives through the lens of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: TROOPS, Inc. receives initial $10M+ investment from Wang & Lee Group for strategic investment.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on April 3, 2025, TROOPS, Inc. (NASDAQ: TROO) disclosed receiving over $10 million as part of a substantial strategic investment from Wang & Lee Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WLGS). The investment is anticipated to surpass this initial amount and full completion is expected in the near future.

news.headline: Linux Foundation sets schedule for Open Source Summit in Denver in 2025, expecting thousands of enthusiasts. #OpenSource #Summit #Denver
news.summary: Starting this year in Denver, a major open source event in North America will unite thousands of open source supporters. Taking place in San Francisco on April 3, 2025, the Linux Foundation, a nonprofit organization driving innovation through open source, will host this event. It is expected to draw in a large crowd of attendees passionate about open source technology.

news.headline: Lumen Bioscience's LMN-201 shows 100% initial cure in C. difficile trial; main cohort recruiting. Potential market disruption.
news.summary: Lumen has made a significant breakthrough in the market for treating C. diff infections with its spirulina-based drug development platform. The RePreve Trial's main cohort is currently open for recruitment. The announcement comes as Lumen released top-line results on April 3, 2025. This development has the potential to greatly impact the market, with important implications for the treatment of C. diff infections.

news.headline: Cyngn secures 22nd U.S. patent for AI-powered autonomous vehicle tech, total U.S. patents granted since Aug 2023.
news.summary: As of August 2023, Cyngn has acquired twelve new patents, increasing the total number of U.S. patents granted to 22. The headquarters of the company, Cyngn Inc., is in Menlo Park, California. On April 3, 2025, Cyngn publicly shared the approval of a fresh patent, numbered as 12,246,733. This announcement was made by the company, known by its Nasdaq ticker symbol CYN.

news.headline: Comoto partners with Motorcycle Industry Council to fuel motorcycling future with educational programs and community events.
news.summary: A recent collaboration in Philadelphia aims to support the development of upcoming motorcycle riders by providing educational initiatives and organizing community gatherings. On April 3, 2025, the Comoto Family of Brands, which includes Cycle Gear, RevZilla, J&P Cycles, and REVER, joined forces to further this initiative. This partnership brings together a network that reaches a vast audience within the motorcycle community, with hopes of nurturing future riders.

news.headline: Prospect Capital (NASDAQ: PSEC) had its credit ratings reaffirmed at BBB by Egan-Jones Ratings Company.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Prospect Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: PSEC) confirmed that Egan-Jones Ratings Company upheld their investment grade issuer and institutional notes credit ratings for Prospect at BBB, with preferred stock credit ratings at BBB-.

news.headline: SRQ Resources received drilling authorization for Lac Brennan project in Quebec.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, SRQ Resources Inc. (TSX-V: SRQ) disclosed that they have obtained the "Autorisation d’Exploration à Impact" for their Lac Brennan project located in Quebec.

news.headline: TowneBank and Old Point Financial Corp. to merge in deal worth $125 million.
Nobel Resources Corp. acquires four Chilean copper projects, including Cuprita, Janett, Pampa Austral, and Anais in Antofagasta Region.
news.summary: Nobel Resources Corp. has successfully finalized the acquisition of four copper projects, known as Cuprita, Janett, Pampa Austral, and Anais, located in the Antofagasta Region, Chile. Through this transaction, Nobel has secured the option to purchase 100% ownership of each project. For more information on the transaction and specific project details, refer to the press release issued on January 6, 2025. The company's stock symbol on the TSX Venture Exchange is NBLC.

news.headline: STEF partners with Toyota Material Handling Europe and Plug Power to introduce hydrogen forklifts in France and Spain.
news.summary: In Slingerlands, New York, on April 3, 2025, STEF Group, a prominent European company specializing in transport and logistics services for temperature-controlled food items, announced the commencement of two hydrogen initiatives. These projects involve collaborations with Toyota Material Handling Europe, a leading provider of hydrogen fuel cell material handling tools, and Plug Power, a key player in green hydrogen solutions. Situated in Athis-Mons, France, and Torrejón de Ardoz, Spain, these projects signify a substantial advancement in establishing a holistic hydrogen network that combines hydrogen production with material handling equipment powered by hydrogen.

news.headline: Pharmacorp to acquire Pre-1954 Charter Company in Ontario for $2,090,000. Deal to close by April 30, 2025.
news.summary: SASKATOON, Saskatchewan, April 03, 2025 - PharmaCorp RX INC. (TSXV: PCRX) has signed a definitive share purchase agreement with an independent vendor to acquire a 100% interest in a pre-1954 charter company based in Ontario, Canada. The total purchase price for this acquisition is $2,090,000, which will be funded through cash reserves held by PharmaCorp. The transaction is anticipated to be finalized by April 30, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements. There are no finder's fees associated with this agreement.

news.headline: Alta Equipment Group announces dividend of $625 per preferred share on April 30, 2025 to shareholders of record on April 15.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Livonia, Michigan, Alta Equipment Group Inc. (NYSE: ALTG) declared a quarterly dividend of $625 per preferred share on its Series A Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock. For each outstanding Depositary Share, which represents a 1/1000th fractional interest in one share of Series A Preferred, the dividend will amount to $0.625. Shareholders of record at the end of business on April 15, 2025, will receive the dividend on April 30, 2025.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Karbon-X Corp. (OTCQX: KARX) to trade on OTCQX, upgrading from OTCQB. 12,000 securities traded.
news.summary: In New York on April 03, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc., known for operating regulated markets for trading 12,000 U.S. and international securities, revealed that Karbon-X Corp. (OTCQX: KARX), a company emphasizing sustainability, is now eligible for trading on the OTCQX® Best Market. Karbon-X Corp. moved up from the OTCQB® Venture Market to OTCQX, showcasing their progress and market performance.

news.headline: Study shows low-risk melanoma patients avoiding sentinel lymph node biopsy had positive survival outcomes with DecisionDx-Melanoma test.
news.summary: Castle recently released data showing the substantial influence of DecisionDx-Melanoma on Sentinel Lymph Node Biopsy (SLNB) decisions. The data highlights the meaningful impact of DecisionDx-Melanoma in guiding treatment decisions, with a notable increase in the number of patients opting for SLNB based on the test results. This demonstrates the crucial role of DecisionDx-Melanoma in providing valuable information for clinicians and patients, potentially leading to more informed treatment plans.

news.headline: Boundless Bio (Nasdaq: BOLD) to join Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference with CEO, Zachary Hornby.
news.summary: Boundless Bio, a clinical-stage oncology company listed on Nasdaq as BOLD, is focused on studying extrachromosomal DNA (ecDNA) biology to develop innovative treatments for patients with oncogene amplified cancers. The company recently revealed that its President and CEO, Zachary Hornby, will take part in Needham’s Virtual Healthcare Conference. This event is significant for the company as it aims to showcase its advancements and potential in the field.

news.headline: PONY AI receives permit for Level 4 Robotaxi testing in Luxembourg, establishing first European hub, joining China, US, South Korea.
news.summary: In New York on April 03, 2025, Pony AI Inc. (Nasdaq: PONY), a prominent name in autonomous mobility, shared the news of obtaining a permit from Luxembourg’s Ministry of Mobility and Public Works for commencing Level 4 (L4) Robotaxi testing. This significant development coincides with Pony.ai's initiation of its primary European research and testing center in Luxembourg, making it a trailblazer as the first autonomous vehicle entity to do so. With testing permits already in place in China, the United States, South Korea, and Luxembourg, Pony.ai is progressively advancing towards creating a safer, more efficient, and accessible autonomous mobility landscape.

news.headline: Emma Whelan appointed as CFO at MarginEdge, a restaurant management platform, bringing 20 years of financial leadership experience.
news.summary: MarginEdge, a top restaurant management and bill payment platform based in Arlington, Virginia, has named Emma Whelan as its Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Whelan, who brings nearly 20 years of financial leadership experience to the role, was previously the Senior Vice President of Finance and Chief Accounting Officer at The Knot Worldwide (TKWW). In her new position, she will be instrumental in driving MarginEdge's growth strategy as the company expands. This appointment underscores MarginEdge's commitment to strengthening its financial operations and leadership team for the future.

news.headline: Skechers launches Harry Kane's player edition boot in honor of his achievements, to be debuted on April 4th.
news.summary: In London, Skechers pays tribute to renowned football striker Harry Kane by unveiling his inaugural Player Edition boot, the Skechers SKX_1.5. This release comes after Kane's outstanding performance in 2024, winning the European Golden Boot as the top scorer in Europe and achieving a historic milestone of being the first English player to score 10 goals in a single Champions League season. The boots will make their debut on April 4th as Kane, representing Bayern Munich, takes on FC Au.

news.headline: Hinckley Allen wins $34.5M settlement for client in SOX Whistleblower case after nine-year legal battle.
news.summary: Carlos Domenech Zornoza has been cleared of all charges after a lengthy legal fight lasting nine years. The law firm Hinckley Allen successfully secured a significant win for Mr. Domenech, helping him to recover a massive sum of $34.5 million. This outcome represents a major milestone in the case, bringing an end to a long and arduous legal battle for justice.

news.headline: OrderGrid recognized as one of Americas' Fastest Growing Companies 2025 by Financial Times. Prestigious award presented by FT and Statista Inc.
news.summary: Based in Toronto, on April 3, 2025, OrderGrid is acknowledged for its exceptional growth by being named one of The Americas' Fastest Growing Companies of 2025 by the Financial Times in collaboration with Statista Inc. This renowned honor is a testament to OrderGrid's outstanding performance and success.

news.headline: Beyond Identity appoints Ligeia Zeruto, Bob Burke, and Louis Marascio to executive team for growth initiatives.
news.summary: Ligeia Zeruto, Bob Burke, and Louis Marascio have been named to the executive team of Beyond Identity with the goal of driving growth through federal practice, secure-by-design efforts, and product innovation. The appointments were announced on April 3, 2025, in New York. Beyond Identity is a prominent secure identity provider that aims to bolster its operations through these strategic moves.

news.headline: CYFOX releases email security solution with Microsoft 365 integration, removes need for MX record changes.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on April 3, 2025, a cybersecurity startup named CYFOX revealed its latest email security solution powered by GenAI technology. The innovative product is designed to seamlessly integrate with Microsoft 365, streamlining the process by removing the necessity for MX record alterations and domain-level adjustments. This emergence marks a significant advancement in the cybersecurity sector, with CYFOX paving the way for simpler and more efficient email security protocols.

news.headline: Thompson Thrift opens 300-unit Standard441 in Lady Lake, Florida, via ribbon cutting ceremony.
news.summary: A ribbon-cutting event was held by Thompson Thrift, a prominent real estate company, for Standard441, a freshly constructed multifamily community in the Lady Lake suburb of Orlando, Florida. With a total of 300 units, this development signifies the company's commitment to the area as a leading multifamily developer in the nation. The event took place on April 3, 2025.

news.headline: Dollarama sees 4.9% growth in Q4 sales, 21.7% increase in earnings per share, achieves fiscal 2025 targets. Dividend raised by 15%.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, there was a 4.9% growth in comparable store sales, while the fiscal year 2025 saw a 4.6% growth. Diluted net earnings per share also showed positive results, with a 21.7% increase to $1.40 for the fourth quarter and a 16.9% increase to $4.16 for Fiscal 2025. All metrics for Fiscal 2025 guidance were either met or exceeded. Additionally, there was a 15.0% increase in quarterly dividends.

news.headline: BCE to report Q1 2025 results on May 8. Conference call at 8 am Eastern with CEO Mirko Bibic.
news.summary: BCE Inc., a telecommunications company listed on both the TSX and NYSE under ticker symbol BCE, is set to discuss its first-quarter 2025 financial results with investors and analysts during a conference call scheduled for May 8, 2025, at 8:00 am Eastern Time. Mirko Bibic, the President and CEO, will be among the participants during the call.
